summary: Bug Fixes Verification - ALL 14 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) dotenv.config() fix working - emails sending correctly, (2) Data isolation fixed - no null assignedToId leaks, (3) Contract auto-generation working, (4) Quote flow complete with email notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: server.ts lines 1-3: dotenv.config() correctly placed BEFORE all imports - emails now working
leads.ts line 107: where clause correctly uses { assignedToId: userId } - no null leak
quotes.ts lines 224-230: Lead ownership check properly enforced with findFirst where clause
Backend logs confirm: 'Owner notification email sent successfully', 'Auto-response sent to', 'Quote email sent successfully', 'Contract sent email sent to'
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing were cleaned up (TEST_Email_Lead_*, TEST_Quote_Lead_*, TEST_AcceptQuote_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 critical bug fixes verified working: (1) Emails send correctly now that dotenv.config() is at top of server.ts, (2) Data isolation fixed - GET /api/leads returns only user's leads with no null assignedToId, (3) Contract auto-generation works after quote acceptance, (4) Full quote flow working: create->send->accept->contract email. Stripe payment links expected to fail with 401 (test key sk_test_emergent is invalid).
